metadata.title:
TRUTH IS REVEALED,


HILL BACKS GRAVES

pages.raw_text:
The railroad prophet who does
stunts for the Portland Telegram has
had revelation of the secret plans
Of the great railroad magnates who
have interests in the northwest. He
reveals in n recent issue of that
paper great deal Of naked truth
without an apology,


He confldes to the trusting public
the fact that the Spokane & Inland
railroad. projected by jay Graves
through the Palouse country, is but
scheme of Jim Hill's to invade
Hartman territory. That may be So,
but Spokane needs and wants that
electric line.


lie let's out gasp when he thinks
Of all the money that these various
electric lines out Of Spokane will cost
and secs no one or the horizon to
furnish IT but James J Iiill. May be
20, but there are several inactive dol
